# reviewqr.site

> The #1 free Google Maps Review QR Code Generator.

## What is reviewqr.site?

reviewqr.site is a completely free online tool that generates customizable QR codes linking directly to a business's Google Maps review page. It is designed for restaurants, cafés, hotels, salons, clinics, and any local business that wants to increase their Google reviews.

## URL

https://reviewqr.site

## Features

- Generate QR codes from any Google Maps review link
- 5 premium frame designs: Minimalist, Bold & Loud, Gradient Glow, Elegant Classic, Playful Bubble
- Google logo and 5-star rating badge on every frame
- Google Maps pin icon
- Upload your business logo into the center of the QR code
- Full color customization: QR code color, background color, frame theme color, star color
- 5 font families: Inter (Modern), Serif (Classic), Monospace (Tech), Cursive (Fancy), Nunito (Rounded)
- Custom title and subtitle text on the frame
- Adjustable QR code size (100px–350px)
- Adjustable frame corner radius (0px–100px)
- Adjustable QR code padding/margin
- Error correction level control (L/M/Q/H) for logo compatibility
- Multi-language support: English, Portuguese, Spanish, French, German
- Automatic browser language detection
- URL parameter language support (?lang=pt)
- High-resolution PNG download at 3x pixel ratio
- One-click copy to clipboard
- Dark mode and light mode toggle
- No signup required
- No watermarks
- No usage limits
- No ads
- Completely free

## Who is this for?

- Restaurants and cafés
- Hotels and Airbnb hosts
- Barbershops and hair salons
- Dental and medical clinics
- Gyms and fitness studios
- Pet shops and veterinary clinics
- Car washes and auto repair shops
- Real estate agents
- Retail stores
- Any local business on Google Maps

## How to use

1. Find your Google Maps business review link (Google Maps → your business → Share → Copy link)
2. Go to https://reviewqr.site
3. Paste your link
4. Customize colors, frame design, logo, font, and language
5. Download your QR code as a high-resolution PNG or copy it to clipboard

## Why Google Reviews matter

Google Reviews directly impact local SEO ranking. Businesses with more positive reviews appear higher in Google Maps search results, attract more customers, and build trust. A QR code makes it effortless for customers to leave a review.

## Pricing

Free. $0. No hidden fees. No premium tiers. No signup.

## Creator

Made with ❤️ by Oxiria Studios (https://oxiria.com)

## Technical Details

- Built with React + TypeScript + Vite
- Uses qrcode.react for QR generation
- Uses html-to-image for PNG export
- Internationalization via i18next
- No backend, no database, no tracking
- Fully client-side, privacy-friendly
- Hosted as a static site

## Alternatives comparison

| Feature | reviewqr.site | Other tools |
|---|---|---|
| Price | Free | $5–$20/month |
| Google branding | ✅ Logo + Stars | ❌ Generic |
| Frame designs | 5 premium | 1–2 basic |
| Logo upload | ✅ | Often paid |
| Multi-language | 5 languages | English only |
| Signup required | No | Yes |
| Watermarks | None | Often yes |

Visit https://reviewqr.site or reach out to Oxiria Studios.
